GIS Mapping Software.name: GIS Mapping Software
description: Created for ECE297 - Software Design and Communication in a team with 2 other students
Scraped and parsed data from OpenStreetMaps Database to create an interactive GIS for everyday usage
Built entirely using C++, with help from tools such as EZGL, GTK, and git
Developed approach to A* and Travelling Salesman, acheived top 30th percentile in class out of 100+ teams

Sistema Toronto App.name: Sistema Toronto App
description: Project developed within UofT Blueprint with 8 other amazing developers for Sistema Toronto
Created a brand-new, free app to assist Sistema teachers in developing music lessons for children
Made using React Native and Javascript for both Apple and Android users, using tools like Android Studio, git, and Figma
Personally responsible for integrating Google Drive API for retreiving, caching, and displaying images on the home page

Personal Website.name: Personal Website
description: You're seeing it right now! Inspired by Windows 98's utilitarian design aspects
Made for personal and professional usage, and to host future projects
Made using React, TailwindCSS, Javascript, and Github Pages

Receipt Journal.name: Receipt Journal
description: Coming Soon! A project near and dear to my heart, years in the making
